response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine breadth across ~20 years of software development and some recent AI-adjacent work (MCP frameworks, agentic tooling at re:cinq), but the role demands a Director-level IC with deep, recognized AI expertise and a demonstrated track record of shipping AI-powered platforms or products at scale. His AI exposure is confined to a 6-month stint ending in a career gap, he holds no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and his background is hands-on application development rather than cloud platform strategy or executive-level customer advisory work. The seniority and strategic scope of the role significantly exceed his current profile.
strengths: ~20 years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains provides broad technical foundation
Founder of GISCollective and multiple open source projects demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative and builder mentality
Recent contribution to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) shows emerging AI orientation
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent (6 months), far short of the 'recognized expertise with demonstrated AI products/platforms' the role explicitly requires
No cloud platform architecture or cloud strategy experience; career is application and service development, not the infrastructure-layer focus the role centers on
Currently 7+ months into a career gap with no history of director-level IC, strategic advisory, or customer-facing technical leadership work

key_factors.factor: Entrepreneurial / open source builder track record
